Document:
# Station 7 — Server Rules
[bold]Welcome to Station 7.[/bold] Please read and understand these rules before playing. [italic]Admins will treat you as if you have read them, even if you have not.[/italic]
## Core Rules These rules apply at all times, including between rounds.
- [textlink="1. Be Respectful" link="RuleE1"] - [textlink="2. No Griefing" link="RuleE2"] - [textlink="3. Roleplay Standards" link="RuleE3"] - [textlink="4. Listen To Admins" link="RuleE4"] - [textlink="5. No Cheating or Exploiting" link="RuleE5"] - [textlink="6. No Idling" link="RuleE6"] - [textlink="7. Only Use English" link="RuleE7"]
## Our Philosophy
Station 7 exists as a completely free and open server for the love of the game. This is maintained as a passion project which puts the player experience first.
These rules are intentionally kept short and concise, but implicit common sense should also be used. We are not here to make you agree to a wall of rules to play a game.
Admins are here to handle genuine problems, not to hover over your shoulder. If you are playing in good faith and not disrupting the experience of others, you will not be bothered.
## Abuse
Any malicious abuse of these provided services will result in a full irrevocable ban from the Narwal LLC server ecospace.
